---
title: "Lecture plan"
---

| Week | Date | Topic | Slide deck | Exercise | Preparation |
|:-----|:-----|:------|:-----------|:---------|:------------|
| 7 | Mon Feb 9 | Kick-off |  | [0](exercises/technical-prerequisites.qmd) | Complete all [technical prerequisites](exercises/technical-prerequisites.qmd) |
|  | Thu Feb 12 | Asset prices | [📊](slides.qmd#aef-1-introduction "Introduction") |  |  |
| 8 | Mon Feb 16 | Optimal portfolio choice | [📊](slides.qmd#aef-2-portfolio-choice "Portfolio choice") | [1](exercises/introduction.qmd#introduction-to-tidy-finance) | Chapter 3 in [R for Data Science](https://r4ds.hadley.nz/data-transform) (data transformation), Sections 2.1 and 3.1 of [Portfolio Choice Problems](https://doi-org.ep.fjernadgang.kb.dk/10.1016/B978-0-444-50897-3.50008-0) |
|  | Thu Feb 19 | Optimal portfolio choice | [📊](slides.qmd#aef-2-portfolio-choice "Portfolio choice") | [2](exercises/introduction.qmd#scaling-up-the-analysis) | Introduction and Section 1 of [Risk Reduction in Large Portfolios](https://onlinelibrary-wiley-com.ep.fjernadgang.kb.dk/doi/full/10.1111/1540-6261.00580) |
| 9 | Thu Feb 26 | Multifactor models | [📊](slides.qmd#aef-3-multifactor-models-and-the-reproducibility-crisis "Multifactor models & the reproducibility crisis") | [3](exercises/financial_data.qmd), [4](exercises/beta_estimation.qmd) | Chapters 7 and 8 of [Empirical Asset Pricing: The Cross-Section of Stock Returns](https://www.wiley.com/en-us/Empirical+Asset+Pricing%3A+The+Cross+Section+of+Stock+Returns-p-9781118095041) |
| | Fri Feb 27  | **MA 1 released** |  | [Quarto](additional-material/quarto-documentation.qmd) | |
| 10 | Mon Mar 2 | Reproducibility crisis | [📊](slides.qmd#aef-3-multifactor-models-and-the-reproducibility-crisis "Multifactor models & the reproducibility crisis") | [5](exercises/portfolio_sorts.qmd) | FT article: "The hidden 'replication crisis' of finance" |
|  | Thu Mar 5 | Reproducibility crisis | [📊](slides.qmd#aef-3-multifactor-models-and-the-reproducibility-crisis "Multifactor models & the reproducibility crisis") |  | |
| | Sat Mar 7  | **MA 1 deadline** |  | | |
| 11 | Thu Mar 12 | ML in Finance | [📊](slides.qmd#aef-4-machine-learning "Machine learning") |  | |
| 12 | Mon Mar 16 | ML in Finance | [📊](slides.qmd#aef-4-machine-learning "Machine learning") | [6](exercises/gu_kelly_xiu.qmd) | [Empirical asset pricing via Machine Learning](https://dachxiu.chicagobooth.edu/download/ML.pdf) |
|  | Thu Mar 19 | ML in Finance | [📊](slides.qmd#aef-4-machine-learning "Machine learning") | [7](exercises/machine_learning.qmd) | |
| 13 | Thu Mar 26 | ML in Finance | [📊](slides.qmd#aef-4-machine-learning "Machine learning") | [8](exercises/machine_learning_nonlinear.qmd) | |
| |  | **Easter break (W14)** |  | | |
| | Fri Apr 3 | **MA 2 released** |  | | |
| 15 | Tue Apr 7 | ML in Finance | [📊](slides.qmd#aef-4-machine-learning "Machine learning") |   | |
|  | Thu Apr 9 | Volatility estimation | [📊](slides.qmd#aef-5-volatility-estimation-and-advanced-portfolio-choice "Volatility estimation & advanced portfolio choice") | [9](exercises/covariance_estimation.qmd) | |
| | Sun Apr 12 | **MA 2 deadline (8pm)** |  | | |
| 16 | Mon Apr 13 | Volatility estimation | [📊](slides.qmd#aef-5-volatility-estimation-and-advanced-portfolio-choice "Volatility estimation & advanced portfolio choice") |  | |
| 17 | Thu Apr 23 | Portfolio optimization | [📊](slides.qmd#aef-5-volatility-estimation-and-advanced-portfolio-choice "Volatility estimation & advanced portfolio choice") | [10](exercises/portfolio_choice.qmd) | |
| 18 | Mon Apr 27 | Parametric Portfolio Choice | [📊](slides.qmd#aef-5-volatility-estimation-and-advanced-portfolio-choice "Volatility estimation & advanced portfolio choice") | [11](exercises/high-frequency-econometrics.qmd#read-in-and-process-lobster-files.qmd) | |
|  | Thu Apr 30 | High-frequency econometrics | [📊](slides.qmd#aef-6-high-frequency-econometrics "High-frequency econometrics") | | |
| | Fri May 1  | **MA 3 released** |  | | |
| 19 | Thu May 7 | Guest lecture: Cilie Feldager Chief GenAI Model Evaluation Expert (Danske Bank) |  | [12](exercises/high-frequency-econometrics.qmd#brownian-motion-and-realized-volatility.qmd) | |
| | Sun May 10 | **MA 3 deadline (8pm)** |  | | |
| 20 | Mon May 11 | High-frequency econometrics | [📊](slides.qmd#aef-6-high-frequency-econometrics "High-frequency econometrics") | | |
| 21 | Tue May 19 | High-frequency econometrics | [📊](slides.qmd#aef-6-high-frequency-econometrics "High-frequency econometrics") | | |
|  | Thu May 21 | Q&A |  | | |

: {.primary .hover}

```{=html}
<style>
tr.current-week td {
  background-color: rgba(var(--bs-primary-rgb), 0.12) !important;
  font-weight: 600;
}
</style>
<script>
document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function () {
  const today = new Date();
  today.setHours(0, 0, 0, 0);

  const dow = today.getDay();
  const weekStart = new Date(today);
  weekStart.setDate(today.getDate() + (dow === 0 ? -6 : 1 - dow));
  const weekEnd = new Date(weekStart);
  weekEnd.setDate(weekStart.getDate() + 6);

  const months = {Jan:0,Feb:1,Mar:2,Apr:3,May:4,Jun:5,Jul:6,Aug:7,Sep:8,Oct:9,Nov:10,Dec:11};

  document.querySelectorAll('table tbody tr').forEach(function (row) {
    const cells = row.querySelectorAll('td');
    if (cells.length < 2) return;
    const m = cells[1].textContent.trim().match(/\b(Jan|Feb|Mar|Apr|May|Jun|Jul|Aug|Sep|Oct|Nov|Dec)\s+(\d+)/);
    if (!m) return;
    const d = new Date(today.getFullYear(), months[m[1]], parseInt(m[2]));
    if (d >= weekStart && d <= weekEnd) row.classList.add('current-week');
  });
});
</script>
```
